work_unit: Reconcile audit-cycle-state L01 status drift (marked merged but commit never reached main)
situation: audit-cycle-state.json derived_fixes SCRIPTS-L01 (case-2026-07-03-082) was marked status=merged, but git verification shows commit e2ce8c8/bad42c2 only exists on branch auto/opt-scripts-l04-1783082107 which has NOT been merged to main. case-082 outcome_evidence claimed 'pushed to origin' (true) but conflated push with merge. This drift means pending_count=1 undercounts real pending work; when human merges opt-scripts-l04-1783082107, both L01 and L04 will land together.
action: Corrected audit-cycle-state.json: SCRIPTS-L01 status reverted from 'merged' to 'pending'; pending_count updated 1→2; merged_ready_count 5→4; _status_note rewritten to reflect combined L01+L04 worktree awaiting single merge. No code changes. Wrote this reconciliation case for traceability.
outcome_evidence: git branch -a --contains bad42c2 returns only '+ auto/opt-scripts-l04-1783082107' (no main). git ls-remote confirms origin/auto/opt-scripts-l04-1783082107 = bad42c2. Main HEAD c265d16 does not contain verify-pattern sys.argv fix. State file now accurately reflects 2 pending fixes (L01+L04) in single unmerged worktree.
next_suggestion: Human: merge opt-scripts-l04-1783082107 to close both L01+L04 in one action. After merge, next ralph round should update both statuses to merged and transition audit-cycle-state to cycle-complete → triggers new deep audit. Scout recommends #1 skills (marker-file triage check before new work) or #2 1BfrYW9R (6 worktrees review queue).

audit_findings.finding: SCRIPTS-L01 status=merged contradicts observable git state: commit bad42c2 is not reachable from main. Case-082 outcome_evidence conflated 'pushed to origin branch' with 'merged to main'. Status tracking must distinguish these states to avoid false cycle-complete transitions.
audit_findings.remediation: Revert status to pending. Add guard: future 'merged' updates must verify via 'git branch -a --contains <commit> | grep main' before marking. Consider adding explicit 'pushed' intermediate status to schema.
